description: Remote Desktop Protocol — graphical remote access, pass-the-hash GUI sessions, credential brute-forcing, and drive mounting.

tools.name: xfreerdp
tools.description: Feature-rich RDP client supporting pass-the-hash, drive redirection, clipboard sharing, and dynamic resolution.

commands.title: Standard login with password
commands.description: Connect via RDP with password authentication and skip certificate validation.

commands.title: Domain login
commands.description: Connect with domain credentials.

commands.title: Pass-the-Hash login
commands.description: Connect via RDP using an NTLM hash (requires Restricted Admin mode enabled on target).

commands.title: Mount local drive
commands.description: Mount a local directory (/tmp) as a network drive on the remote desktop.

commands.title: Dynamic resolution
commands.description: Connect with dynamic resolution that adjusts to window size.

commands.title: Custom resolution
commands.description: Connect with a specific screen resolution.

commands.title: Fullscreen with clipboard
commands.description: Fullscreen RDP session with clipboard sharing enabled.

commands.title: Full featured connection
commands.description: Full-featured connection with domain auth, dynamic resolution, clipboard, and drive mounting.

commands.title: Restricted Admin mode (PtH)
commands.description: PtH with restricted admin mode (no credentials cached on target).

commands.title: Connect on non-standard port
commands.description: Connect to RDP on a non-standard port.

tools.name: rdesktop
tools.description: Lightweight RDP client for quick connections.

commands.title: Standard login
commands.description: Connect via RDP with username and password.

commands.title: Domain login
commands.description: Connect with domain credentials.

commands.title: Fullscreen mode
commands.description: Connect in fullscreen mode.

commands.title: Share local folder
commands.description: Mount a local folder on the remote desktop.

tools.name: crowbar — RDP Brute-force
tools.description: Brute-force tool supporting RDP with NLA (Network Level Authentication).

commands.title: Single user, single password
commands.description: Test a single credential pair against RDP.

commands.title: Single user, password list
commands.description: Brute-force RDP with a password list for a single user.

commands.title: User list, single password
commands.description: Spray a single password against multiple users via RDP.

commands.title: User list, password list
commands.description: Full brute-force with user and password lists.

tools.name: hydra — RDP Brute-force
tools.description: Fast network brute-forcer supporting RDP protocol.

commands.title: Single user with wordlist
commands.description: Brute-force RDP password for a single user.

commands.title: User list with wordlist
commands.description: Brute-force RDP with user and password lists.

commands.title: Single credential check
commands.description: Verify a single RDP credential pair.

commands.title: With verbose output
commands.description: Brute-force with verbose output showing each attempt.

tools.name: NetExec (nxc) — RDP
tools.description: RDP credential validation and screenshot capture via NetExec.

commands.title: Check RDP access with password
commands.description: Test if credentials have RDP access.

commands.title: Check RDP access with PtH
commands.description: Test RDP access using pass-the-hash.

commands.title: RDP screenshot
commands.description: Take a screenshot of the RDP session.

commands.title: Check NLA status
commands.description: Check NLA (Network Level Authentication) status and take a screenshot.
